title: Crackdown on infiltration
desc: Zero-tolerance policy — 'detect, delete and deport' undocumented immigrants; seal India-Bangladesh border.

title: DA arrears + 7th Pay Commission
desc: Clear all pending Dearness Allowance for government employees and pensioners; implement 7th Pay Commission recommendations.

title: 1 crore jobs + ₹3,000 for unemployed youth
desc: Create 1 crore new jobs and self-employment opportunities; monthly ₹3,000 financial aid to unemployed youth.

title: Women's safety — Durga Suraksha Squads + 33% reservation
desc: Women-only police battalions, 'Durga Suraksha Sahaya' scheme; 33% reservation for women in all state government jobs including police.

title: ₹3,000 monthly financial support for women
desc: Direct bank transfer of ₹3,000 to every eligible woman beneficiary each month.

title: Agricultural support — rice, potato, mango
desc: Enhanced MSP and subsidies for key crops; full rollout of PM Kisan Samman Nidhi.

title: Fishermen welfare — PM Matsya Sampada Yojana
desc: Register all fishermen under the scheme; develop modern fish processing units; make West Bengal a leading fisheries export hub.

title: Uniform Civil Code (UCC) + anti-cattle smuggling law
desc: Legislate and implement UCC ensuring a single uniform set of laws for all citizens; strict law to end cattle smuggling across Bengal's borders.

title: Tea industry revival + jute modernisation
desc: Rejuvenate old tea gardens; strengthen global branding of Darjeeling Tea; develop tea tourism; modernise jute industry.

title: Healthcare — Ayushman Bharat + AIIMS in North Bengal
desc: Full implementation of Ayushman Bharat; free HPV vaccination; breast cancer screening; establish AIIMS, IIT, and IIM in North Bengal.

title: White Paper on TMC governance failures
desc: Three White Papers exposing corruption, political violence, and law-and-order collapse over 15 years of TMC rule.

title: End syndicate culture and 'cut money'
desc: Dismantle grassroots-level syndicate networks; eliminate the 'cut money' practice from public contracting.

title: Linguistic recognition — Kurmali and Rajbanshi
desc: Include Kurmali and Rajbanshi languages in the Eighth Schedule of the Constitution, giving them official recognition.

title: Vande Mataram Museum + religious freedom law
desc: Establish a Vande Mataram Museum to promote national heritage; enact a law guaranteeing freedom of religious practices.

title: Political violence commission
desc: Constitute a commission led by a retired Supreme Court judge to investigate all instances of political violence.

title: Replace fear with trust
desc: BJP government will eliminate the atmosphere of fear prevailing in Bengal and restore faith in the rule of law.

title: Accountable administration
desc: The administrative machinery will be fully accountable and answerable to the citizens it serves.

title: Reopen all scam and corruption files
desc: Every file on scams, corruption, injustice against women, and rape cases will be reopened and acted upon.

title: No one above the law
desc: Ministers, officials or party workers engaged in corruption will all be held legally accountable.

title: CAA rights for refugees; deportation of infiltrators
desc: Refugees will receive every constitutional right and privilege; infiltrators will be deported.

title: 7th Pay Commission — immediate
desc: Implement the 7th Pay Commission the moment a BJP government is formed.

title: MSP guarantee for all key crops
desc: Ensure fair Minimum Support Price for paddy, potato, mango and other staple crops.

title: Industrial parks + MSME promotion
desc: Set up new industrial parks, simplify business approvals through a single-window clearance system.

title: National Education Policy (NEP) + STEM
desc: Implement NEP fully; introduce coding and STEM education in schools.

title: Enhanced pensions
desc: Increase pension amounts for all vulnerable groups; extend housing benefits.

title: New highways + metro completion
desc: Build highways connecting North and South Bengal; complete pending Kolkata metro projects.

title: Tourism development
desc: Promote eco-tourism across all three key zones; develop spiritual tourism circuits.

title: Darjeeling Tea global branding
desc: Create an internationally promoted Darjeeling Tea brand; develop tea-garden tourism.

title: UNESCO recognition for festivals
desc: Push for UNESCO cultural heritage recognition for Durga Puja and other major festivals.

title: CAA citizenship processing
desc: Speed up citizenship applications under the Citizenship Amendment Act for eligible refugees.

title: Restore Asansol's industrial strength
desc: Revive industrial base of Asansol; dismantle mafia networks.

title: Free HPV vaccination + institutional delivery
desc: Provide free HPV vaccination and cancer screening; ensure free institutional delivery support.

title: Fishermen — cyclone insurance + trawlers
desc: Provide dedicated insurance against cyclone losses; supply modern trawlers.
